creator: fabian@wenks.ch
text:
Hello Petr

On 20.05.2013 00:19, Petr Rehor wrote:
>
> Please update amavisd-milter port to 1.6.0.

With the Port upgrade I was doing today, I was forced to rebuild 
amavisd-milter, because of the upgrade from security/libgcrypt to 
1.5.2. I did manually adjust my local amavisd-milter port to 
upgrade to 1.6.0. I can confirm, that it does build and run on 
FreeBSD 9.1.

Thank you!


bye
Fabian
